generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor on MABI MAX 100 first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position of motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder measuring angular position of gearbox output"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCalculationComponent
]

instance DerivedMotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCalculationComponent
]

instance DerivedMotorAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCalculationComponent
]

instance DerivedGearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCalculationComponent
]

// C4: Data from sensors and processing components
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of motor current I_M obtained via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of motor angular position r_M obtained via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of gearbox angular position r_G obtained via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ calculated from motor current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor angular velocity ω_M computed for control tuning"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor acceleration a_M computed from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedGearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox angular velocity ω_G computed for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedGearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

// C2: Digital and simulation components
instance CentralDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central digital twin component aggregating simulation and data calculation"
]

instance SimulationMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Processing component simulating motor dynamics with MathWorks Simulink"
]

instance SimulationGearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Processing component simulating gearwheel dynamics"
]

instance SimulationGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Processing component simulating gearbox dynamics"
]

instance DataCalculationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Processing component computing derived torque, angular velocity, and acceleration from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted,
                          DerivedMotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted,
                          DerivedMotorAccelerationDataTransmitted,
                          DerivedGearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance MabiMax100FirstVerticalAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first vertical axis"
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of first vertical axis including motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for gearbox dynamics without friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb and viscous friction model used in simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model used in simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model used in simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used in simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework enabling processing of sensor data and simulation outputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService,
                      ControlParameterProvisionService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for executing Simulink motor, gearwheel, and gearbox simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard platform for visualizing measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing real‑time comparison of multiple friction models using live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelUpdateInsight,
                      JointWearInsight,
                      TemperatureEffectInsight,
                      LoadVariationInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing Simulink motor, gearwheel, and gearbox simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DerivedTorqueInsight,
                      MotorAngularVelocityInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard presenting measured and simulated data traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceDecisionInsight,
                      ToolChangeDecisionInsight
]

instance ControlParameterProvisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing derived torque, angular velocity, and acceleration for control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmTuningInsight
]

// C17: Insights and Actions
instance FrictionModelUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters updated based on real‑time identification"
]

instance JointWearInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint wear derived from friction loss analysis"
]

instance TemperatureEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into temperature effects on motor and gearbox performance"
]

instance LoadVariationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into load variations impacting system"
]

instance DerivedTorqueInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived torque values calculated from sensor data"
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Motor angular velocity computed for control tuning"
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintenance decisions suggested based on wear and performance data"
]

instance ToolChangeDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tool change decisions inferred from friction analysis"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights to tune control algorithm for improved positional accuracy"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on insight"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Schedule maintenance based on insight"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ToolChangeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiate tool change process advised by insight"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time data streaming synchronized with robot control cycle; simulation and processing executed per sample, providing updated friction estimates as data arrives"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of components: physical robot (PT) sending sensor streams via MQTT to Digital Shadow; Digital Shadow’s processing component consumes streams, runs simulation models, generates data traces; simulation models and engineering models are linked via AAS; data traces displayed in unified dashboard; all components interact through defined data trace provenance; the constellation enables continuous friction identification"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated (runtime) stage of the robot during which real‑time data is collected and models updated; additionally, a design/validation stage during which engineering models and simulation models are created and validated against measured data"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of data points to source (via processing component, model, and AAS), continuous comparison of simulated and reference data traces, use of engineering and simulation models for validation, dynamic identification of friction parameters to adapt to wear; uncertainty handled through continuous recalibration; data provenance preserved to support V&V"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way MQTT communication from PT to DT; data streams consist of time‑stamped sensor values (current, positions) and derived variables; DT processing component consumes streams; no reverse communication defined; AAS used for semantic description of assets"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of standardized modeling languages: SysML for system architecture, AAS for asset metadata, UML for reference model; adherence to MBSE methodologies; integration of AAS IDs for semantic consistency"
]
